config.script:
meta = (self.view.custom.selected or {}).get('meta') or {}
	templateId = meta.get('Id')
	if templateId is None:
		return
	label = (meta.get('Code') or '') + ' v' + str(meta.get('VersionNumber') or '')
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id='mpp-confirm-destructive',
		view='BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive',
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			'title':        'Deprecate Template',
			'message':      'Deprecate ' + label + '? This retires the version from production.',
			'confirmLabel': 'Deprecate',
			'replyMessage': 'templateDeprecateConfirmed'
		}
	)

newId = event.value
	currentId = ((self.view.custom.selected or {}).get('meta') or {}).get('Id') or 0
	if newId is None or newId == currentId:
		return
	system.perspective.sendMessage('templateVersionClicked', payload={'id': newId}, scope='page')

transforms.code:
out = []
	for v in (value or []):
		vnum = v.get('VersionNumber', 0)
		name = v.get('Name') or ''
		state = 'Deprecated' if v.get('Deprecated') else 'Active'
		label = 'v' + str(vnum) + ' -- ' + name + ' (' + state + ')'
		out.append({'label': label, 'value': v.get('Id')})
	return out

rows = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(value) or []
	opts = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.fieldOptions) or []
	out = []
	for i, r in enumerate(rows):
		r = dict(r or {})
		r['rowIndex'] = i
		out.append({'row': r, 'fieldOptions': opts})
	return out

props.text: Select a template from the list to view its details, or click + New Template to create one.

customMethods.name: _loadTemplate
customMethods.script:
meta = BlueRidge.Parts.OperationTemplate.getOne(templateId)
	if meta is None:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast('Template not found', 'Id ' + str(templateId) + ' no longer exists.', 'warning')
		return
	self.view.custom.selected   = {'meta': dict(meta)}
	self.view.custom.editDraft  = {'meta': dict(meta)}
	self.view.custom.mode = 'update'
	self.view.custom.selectedTemplateCode = meta.get('Code') or ''
	self.view.custom.selectedVersionId    = meta.get('Id') or 0
	self.view.custom.selectedFieldDcfId   = None
	self.loadFields()

customMethods.name: _refreshDetail
loadFields
handleSaveFields
handleDiscardFields
customMethods.script:
selected = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.fieldsState.selected) or {'rows': []}
	self.view.custom.fieldsState = {'selected': selected, 'editDraft': {'rows': [dict(r) for r in (selected.get('rows') or [])]}}

customMethods.name: addFieldRow
_applyFieldChange
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.fieldsState.editDraft) or {'rows': []})
	rows = list(draft.get('rows') or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(rows):
		return
	row = dict(rows[idx])
	row['dataCollectionFieldId'] = newFieldId
	# Derive code/name from the matching option label ('CODE - Name') when present.
	opts = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.fieldOptions) or []
	label = None
	for o in opts:
		if o.get('value') == newFieldId:
			label = o.get('label')
			break
	if label and ' - ' in label:
		parts = label.split(' - ', 1)
		row['code'] = parts[0]
		row['name'] = parts[1]
	else:
		row['code'] = ''
		row['name'] = ''
	rows[idx] = row
	draft['rows'] = rows
	selected = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.fieldsState.selected) or {'rows': []}
	self.view.custom.fieldsState = {'selected': selected, 'editDraft': draft}

customMethods.name: _applyFieldRequiredChange
_removeFieldRow

messageHandlers.script:
clickedId = (payload or {}).get('id')
	if clickedId is None:
		return
	if self.view.custom.dirty or self.view.custom.fieldsDirty:
		self.view.custom.pendingNav = clickedId
		system.perspective.openPopup(
			id='mpp-confirm-unsaved',
			view='BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmUnsaved',
			modal=True,
			showCloseIcon=False,
			params={
				'title':   'Unsaved changes',
				'message': 'Save changes before switching templates?'
			}
		)
		return
	self._loadTemplate(clickedId)

templateId = (payload or {}).get('id')
	if templateId is None:
		return
	self._loadTemplate(templateId)

clickedId = (payload or {}).get('id')
	if clickedId is None:
		return
	if self.view.custom.dirty or self.view.custom.fieldsDirty:
		self.view.custom.pendingNav = clickedId
		system.perspective.openPopup(
			id='mpp-confirm-unsaved',
			view='BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmUnsaved',
			modal=True,
			showCloseIcon=False,
			params={
				'title':   'Unsaved changes',
				'message': 'Save changes before switching versions?'
			}
		)
		return
	self._loadTemplate(clickedId)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get('rowIndex', -1))
	self._applyFieldChange(idx, payload.get('newFieldId'))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get('rowIndex', -1))
	self._applyFieldRequiredChange(idx, payload.get('isRequired'))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get('rowIndex', -1))
	self._removeFieldRow(idx)
